title: Shield Disabled Indicator
body:
A simple indicator right below your crosshair when your shield is disabled!

**For versions 1.21.8 to 1.21.11**

If there's anything not working, or you would want me to make other versions, let me know in my **[Community Discord](https://discord.gg/xYwZNepebc)**.
**_(Make a ticket for it)_**


![That is how it will look like, (exclamation mark)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72d39ffdc850a94fc738115bba528e46242c2cb8.png)
